title: REO / Foreclosure Questionnaire
description: Answer these questions to create the REO seller document checklist. Agents prepare and send forms in their e-sign system, then upload signed copies here.

questions.label: Was the property built before 1978?
questions.help_text: REO sellers may be exempt from some seller disclosures, but lead-based paint disclosure may still apply.

questions.label: Is the property subject to an owner's association?
Is the property located in a special taxing or assessment district?
Is the property in a flood hazard area?
Will the seller or asset manager require a bank addendum?

document_rules.name: REO Listing Agreement / Asset Manager Listing Package
Seller's Disclosure Exemption / REO Disclosure Notice
document_rules.reason: REO sellers commonly use disclosure exemption or bank disclosure forms

document_rules.name: REO / Bank Addendum
document_rules.reason: Bank or asset manager addendum may be required

document_rules.name: Addendum for Seller's Disclosure of Information on Lead-Based Paint
document_rules.reason: Property may have been built before 1978

document_rules.name: Addendum for Property Subject to Mandatory Membership in Owners' Association
document_rules.reason: Property may be subject to owner's association

document_rules.name: Notice to Purchaser of Real Property Located in a Special Taxing or Assessment District
document_rules.reason: Property may be in a special taxing or assessment district

document_rules.name: Information About Special Flood Hazard Areas
document_rules.reason: Property may be in a flood hazard area
